👥 User Management
NameEmailRoleLast LoginStatus
User management via Azure AD — users are managed in the Azure portal.
To add or remove users, go to portal.azure.com → Azure Active Directory → Users. Role assignment (Admin/Recruiter) is managed via Azure AD Group membership.
